LIFE: Road Trip - Island Adventure

Navigate a tropical island board game collecting memories and souvenirs! Spin the wheel to move forward, land on special spaces to collect items, take photos, or compete in mini-games. Reach the finish with the most happiness points to win. Complete challenges quickly for bonus points!

SPACE: Spin the wheel / Confirm action | ARROW KEYS: Navigate menu selections | Z: Quick action in mini-games | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
